headline: Popular amusement park closes another location, exits state
summary: Demand for amusement parks is not slowing down, despite economic headwinds and geopolitical tensions. In fact, consumers are more focused on the value of experiences and creating fun memories in times of uncertainty. The U.S. amusement and theme park industry is projected to reach a market ...
